delivery_boundary: B0 Workplace Review Alpha before A0 Personal Memory Alpha; provider, mobile, AI, MCP, and theme packages remain later.
design_sequence: After T-B0-P03, T-B0-P03D runs design consultation to create DESIGN.md and plan design review; T-B0-P04 cannot start before that gate. G0 does not create DESIGN.md.

approved_strategy.title: Liaison RM product strategy and Claudia/PingCRM/OKF reconciliation
approved_strategy.scope: Pins OKF v0.1 Draft People authoring, preserves B0 before A0, includes the required OKF People normalization in B0, and excludes general or third-party migrations from B0.

review_branch_dispositions.condition: May be reviewed only as design source after P03, design consultation, canonical DESIGN.md, and plan design review; it is not current P04 authority.
A0 relationship intent and cadence work cannot execute or merge before B0 acceptance.
A0 YAML and CLI relationship intent work cannot execute or merge before B0 acceptance.
